title: NOC 40012 – Government Managers – Education Policy Development and Program Administration | GTR Immigration
description: Government Managers – Education Policy Development and Program Administration under NOC 40012 are senior public administration leaders responsible for shaping curriculum standards, funding structures, regulatory frameworks, and education program delivery across Canada. As Canada continues reforming public education systems and investing in learning innovation, experienced education policy managers remain in steady demand under this TEER 0 management occupation. This occupation is classified at the highest skill level and may qualify under Express Entry and Provincial Nominee Programs.

classification.teer: Classification LevelDetailsBroad Occupation Category4 – Occupations in education, law, and social, community, and government servicesTEER0 – Management occupationsMajor Group40 – Managers in public administration, education and social and community servicesSub-Major Group400 – Managers in public administrationMinor Group4001 – Managers in public administrationNOC Code40012

common_job_titles: Education policy analysis and research director
duties: Government Managers in Education Policy Development perform some or all of the following:
Advise senior government officials on education policy
Develop curriculum standards and regulatory frameworks
Oversee policy research and program implementation
Direct education program officers and analysts
Manage budgets for education programs and support services
Evaluate education system performance and compliance
employment_requirements: Master’s degree in education or a related specialization may be required
Several years of combined experience as a school teacher and government education policy researcher or program officer
Provincial teaching certificate is usually required
Senior roles may require public service security clearance
Extensive teaching experience and leadership in educational administration significantly strengthen eligibility.
salary_prospects: Annual salaries typically range from $57,800 to $175,700, depending on jurisdiction, seniority, and scope of responsibility.
job_outlook: The outlook for NOC 40012 remains stable, supported by:
Advanced academic credentials and policy leadership experience significantly improve competitiveness.
labour_market_demand: Government Managers in Education Policy are employed at:
Opportunities are most prominent in provinces such as Ontario, Quebec, Newfoundland and Labrador, and other major provincial education systems across Canada.
Why Immigrate to Canada Under NOC 40012?
Leadership roles in national and provincial education reform
Candidates with combined classroom teaching and policy experience are particularly competitive.
